notes: Action Strikes is a hybrid cinematic percussion and orchestral hit library for Kontakt, designed for transitions, impacts, ensemble hits, risers, and textural percussion beds in trailer and film music contexts. It blends real orchestral forces — full brass and string ensemble hits — with designed percussion layers, industrial textures, and processed impacts for a hybrid cinematic sound. The library is organised around impacts and transitions, making it particularly useful for placing punctuation marks in a score or building to a climactic moment. CC 1 (Modulation) controls overall intensity and density, making it the primary real-time performance control during recording — pushing the mod wheel up into a hit is a natural way to add impact energy. CC 11 (Expression) shapes the overall dynamic level for quieter, more subtle uses of the library. The Orchestra Layer and Percussion Layer QCs can be independently balanced to dial in the ratio of acoustic ensemble to designed percussion, which fundamentally changes the character from conventional orchestral to full hybrid.

Volume.description: Master output level of the instrument

Expression.description: Dynamic expression — overall level shaping for dynamic control within the hybrid texture

Modulation.description: Intensity / Ensemble Density — increases hit power and layer density in real time; primary performance controller

Sustain.description: Sustain pedal — may hold riser or swell textures in applicable patches

Release Time.description: Tail / Decay — controls the sustain length of impacts and riser tails after note release

Attack Time.description: Attack — sharpness of the initial transient impact

Brightness.description: Tonal brightness — high-frequency filter for shaping harshness and presence of impacts

Reverb Send.description: Reverb wet level — adds additional space to the natural concert hall recording

Quick Control 1.description: Impact Level — overall level and intensity of the primary impact/hit layer

Quick Control 2.description: Orchestra Layer — amount of the orchestral ensemble (brass, strings) hit layer in the mix

Quick Control 3.description: Percussion Layer — amount of the designed percussion and drum layer in the hybrid mix

Quick Control 4.description: Reverb / Space — reverb depth; determines the perceived hall size and ambience of each hit

Quick Control 5.description: Attack — transient sharpness of the hit onset; increase for maximum punch and definition

Quick Control 6.description: Tail / Decay — length of the riser or impact tail; extend for epic, sustained hits

Quick Control 7.description: Intensity / Density — number of layers and overall density; pushes from sparse to massive ensemble hits

Quick Control 8.description: Humanise — subtle random velocity and timing variation to reduce mechanical repetition
